pageContext.name: Venom Symbiote Wolverine
pageContext.description: The newest villain in the Tech-On Avengers series, Venom Symbiote Wolverine, joins S.H.Figuarts with diecast metal parts!  Finished in metallic colors to accentuate the fusion of Wolverine with Venom, it features tube parts molded in translucent plastic, repulsor effects that can be used with other figures, and a stand that helps support dynamic poses, letting you re-create your favorite battle scenes!   Don't miss your chance to add this collectible figure to your Marvel collection today!
